name: Tender ingestion workflow skeleton
purpose: Discover public tender pages, extract normalized tender records, and queue documents for processing.

nodes.name: Scheduled trigger
nodes.description: Runs on a configured interval or admin-triggered webhook.

nodes.name: Load due sources
nodes.description: Reads active tender sources with crawl schedules and extraction config.

nodes.name: Fetch policy router
nodes.description: Attempts direct HTTP first, then escalates to a rendering/proxy provider only when required.

nodes.name: HTML extractor service
nodes.description: Sends raw HTML and source config to a containerized extractor service.

nodes.name: Normalize tender payload
nodes.description: Validates title, buyer, dates, links, documents, and source trace fields.

nodes.name: Upsert tender
nodes.description: Calls a PostgreSQL upsert function using source id and source item key for idempotency.

nodes.name: Queue documents
nodes.description: Creates pending document rows for downstream download and extraction.

nodes.name: Record run status
nodes.description: Writes counts, errors, and timing data for admin review and retries.
